style="--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-r6o4lv, var(--token-fb99fc2b-c6fe-4574-b851-27de024c11d3, rgb(141, 141, 141)))">Yes. Acctual is free invoicing software for small business owners with no monthly fee and no setup cost. We charge 2.7% when a client pays by card and 1% on bank transfers. You don't pay anything until money lands in your account. There's no credit card on file at signup either. Most "free" invoice tools eventually push you onto an upgrade because the company needs the recurring revenue. Our funding doesn't depend on that, so the per transaction fee covers what it actually costs to move money and nothing else.</p></div></div></div></div></div><div class="framer-vsw0hu" data-framer-name="Vector"></div><div class="ssr-variant"><div class="framer-gbqa4q-container"><div class="framer-42SZG framer-lT3I3 framer-8biYL framer-18sht3x framer-v-18sht3x" data-framer-name="Closed" data-highlight="true" tabindex="0" style="width: 100%; <!-- Snippet: jqS2mvhKd -->
<script>
  document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    const link = e.target.closest('a');
    if (!link) return;
    const href = link.href;
    if (!href) return;
    const isSameDomain = link.hostname === window.location.hostname;
    if (isSameDomain) return;
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    if (!params.toString()) return;
    try {
      const url = new URL(href);
      params.forEach((value, key) => {
        if (!url.searchParams.has(key)) {
          url.searchParams.set(key, value);
        }
      });
      e.preventDefault();
      if (link.target === '_blank') {
        window.open(url.toString(), '_blank');
      } else {
        window.location.href = url.toString();
      }
    } catch(err) {
      return;
    }
  });
</script>
<!-- SnippetEnd: jqS2mvhKd -->
